name: convert_time_period_to_epoch_ms
description: Convert a time period (for example, 'last 30 minutes') to epoch milliseconds.

time_period.description: A natural language time period description (e.g., 'last 30 minutes', 'last 24 hours')

name: get_dashboard
description: Fetch details about a specific dashboard.

dashboard_guid.description: The GUID of the dashboard to fetch

name: get_entity
description: Fetch New Relic entities by GUID or search by name pattern.

guid.description: The GUID of the entity to fetch

name.description: Name pattern to search for entities

name: list_related_entities
description: List entities 1 hop away (related) from a given entity GUID.

entity_guid.description: The GUID of the entity to find related entities for

name: list_available_new_relic_accounts
description: List all account IDs available to the user.

name: list_dashboards
description: List all dashboards for a New Relic account.

name: list_entity_types
description: List the complete catalog of New Relic entity types with domain/type definitions.

name: search_entity_with_tag
description: Search for entities using a specific tag key and value.

tag_key.description: The tag key to search by

tag_value.description: The tag value to search by

name: execute_nrql_query
description: Execute an NRQL query against NRDB.

account_id.description: The New Relic account ID to run the query against

name: natural_language_to_nrql_query
description: Execute a query by converting a natural language request into an NRQL query, executing it, and returning the results.

account_id.description: The New Relic account ID to run the query against

question.description: A natural language question to convert to NRQL and execute

name: list_alert_conditions
description: List alert condition details for a specific alert policy.

policy_id.description: The ID of the alert policy

name: search_incident
description: List all alert events (both open and close events) with flexible filtering.

name: list_alert_policies
description: List alert policies for the specified account, optionally filtering by policy name.

name: list_recent_issues
description: Lists all open issues in New Relic for the specified account.

name: list_synthetic_monitors
description: List all synthetic monitors (automated tests that check your services' availability and performance).

name: analyze_deployment_impact
description: Analyze the performance impact of a deployment on a specific entity.

entity_guid.description: The GUID of the entity to analyze

deployment_time_ms.description: The time of the deployment in epoch milliseconds

name: generate_alert_insights_report
description: Generate an alert intelligence analysis report for a specific issue.

issue_id.description: The ID of the issue to analyze

name: generate_user_impact_report
description: Generate an end-user impact analysis report for a specific issue.

issue_id.description: The ID of the issue to analyze

name: list_entity_error_groups
description: Fetch error groups for a specific entity from the Errors Inbox within a time window.

start_time_ms.description: Start of the time window in epoch milliseconds

end_time_ms.description: End of the time window in epoch milliseconds

name: list_change_events
description: List a history of change events from New Relic for the application identified by its entity GUID.

entity_guid.description: The entity GUID of the application

name: analyze_entity_logs
description: Analyze application logs to identify error patterns, anomalous behavior, and recurring issues.

entity_guid.description: The GUID of the entity whose logs to analyze

start_time_ms.description: Start of the time window in epoch milliseconds

end_time_ms.description: End of the time window in epoch milliseconds

name: analyze_golden_metrics
description: Analyze golden metrics (key health indicators: throughput, response time, error rate, and saturation).

entity_guid.description: The GUID of the entity to analyze

start_time_ms.description: Start of the time window in epoch milliseconds

end_time_ms.description: End of the time window in epoch milliseconds

name: analyze_kafka_metrics
description: Analyze Kafka metrics including consumer lag, producer throughput, message latency, and partition balance.

entity_guid.description: The GUID of the Kafka entity to analyze

start_time_ms.description: Start of the time window in epoch milliseconds

end_time_ms.description: End of the time window in epoch milliseconds

name: analyze_threads
description: Analyze thread metric data for a given entity including thread state, CPU usage, and memory consumption.

entity_guid.description: The GUID of the entity to analyze

start_time_ms.description: Start of the time window in epoch milliseconds

end_time_ms.description: End of the time window in epoch milliseconds

name: analyze_transactions
description: Analyze transactions for a specific entity within a time window, identifying slow and error-prone transactions.

entity_guid.description: The GUID of the entity to analyze

start_time_ms.description: Start of the time window in epoch milliseconds

end_time_ms.description: End of the time window in epoch milliseconds

name: list_garbage_collection_metrics
description: List garbage collection and memory metrics for a given account and entity.

start_time_ms.description: Start of the time window in epoch milliseconds

end_time_ms.description: End of the time window in epoch milliseconds

name: list_recent_logs
description: List recent logs from New Relic for the specified account and entity GUID.

entity_guid.description: The GUID of the entity to fetch logs for

start_time_ms.description: Start of the time window in epoch milliseconds

end_time_ms.description: End of the time window in epoch milliseconds
